calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Helen Soprep-Matley 225 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Karen Uchiyama, Esq. appearing on behalf of Plaintiff, Meiyan Enterprises Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ellen Ko, is present.

Defendant, John C. Feely, is not present.
(Defendants Michael Collins, Ltd. dba Poterhouse and John D. Dower were dismissed)

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. The Court orders plaintiff's counsel to pay outstanding sanctions in the amount of $2,750.00 forthwith before the Court trial begins. Sanctions having been paid, Ellen Ko is sworn and examined under direct examination by Karen Uchiyama. The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement dated 10/11/02..................................ID/EV
Exhibit 2: Rental Received.................................................ID/EV
Exhibit 3: Delinquent Water/Utility Tax "Lien Notice" .....................ID/EV
Exhibit 4: Notice of Believe of Abandonment................................ID/EV
Exhibit 5: 3-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit with Proof Of Service..........ID/EV
Exhibit 6: Lease...........................................................ID/EV

The Court after hearing the testimony and evidence presented by plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant, John C. Feely, as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from the defendant, as and for back due rent and liens, the total sum of $43,188.88. The cost of suit is to be determined by the filing of a memorandum of cost pursuant to Section 1033.5 of the California Code of Civil Procedures. Reasonable Attorney's fees and cost pursuant to motion.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits. Judgment is submitted to the Court and signed in open court.
